div.p: Expansion based on codesystem TRE_R256-TypeMessagerie v1.1.0 (CodeSystem)

tr.td: Messagerie électronique rassemblant des acteurs légitimes à l'utiliser

title.value: FR Core ValueSet Email type

display.value: Messagerie électronique rassemblant des acteurs légitimes à l'utiliser

div.style: border: black 1px dotted; background-color: #EEEEEE; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px

li.a: codesystem FR Core CodeSystem Circonstances Sortie v2.0.0 (CodeSystem)

tr.td: Patient parti sans attendre les soins

div.p: The patient was dicharged and has indicated that they are going to return home afterwards.
The patient was discharged and has indicated that they are going to return home afterwards, but not the patient's home - e.g. a family member's home.
The patient was transferred to another healthcare facility.
The patient has been discharged into palliative care.
The patient has been discharged into long-term care where is likely to be monitored through an ongoing episode-of-care.
The patient self discharged against medical advice.
The patient has deceased during this encounter.
The patient has been transferred to a psychiatric facility.
The patient was discharged and is to receive post acute care rehabilitation services.
The patient has been discharged to a skilled nursing facility for the patient to receive additional care.
The discharge disposition has not otherwise defined.

title.value: FR Core ValueSet Encounter discharge disposition

display.value: Patient parti sans attendre les soins

div.style: border: black 1px dotted; background-color: #EEEEEE; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px

div.p: Expansion based on SNOMED CT International edition 01-Sep 2023
This value set expansion contains 58 concepts.

tr.td: Inclined standing in water towards rail
Inclined standing in water away from rail
Supine and quarter turn to right - foot bed raised 14 inches
Supine and quarter turn to left - bed tipped 14 inches
Prone with pillow under hips - foot bed raised 18 inches
Right side-lying with 45 degree turn onto face and pillows under shoulders
Left side-lying with 45 degree turn onto face
Prone on a Relton Hall frame
Patient in supine position with hip support (finding)
Prone body position for enteral nutrition administration
Supine body position for enteral nutrition administration

title.value: FR Core ValueSet BodyPosition

display.value: Inclined standing in water towards rail
Inclined standing in water away from rail

Supine and quarter turn to left - bed tipped 14 inches

Left side-lying with 45 degree turn onto face

Patient in supine position with hip support (finding)

li.a: codesystem FR Core CodeSystem Marital Status v2.0.0 (CodeSystem)

div.p: Marriage contract has been declared null and to not have existed
Marriage contract has been declared dissolved and inactive
A current marriage contract is active
a marriage recognized in some jurisdictions and based on the parties' agreement to consider themselves married and can also be based on documentation of cohabitation.
Person declares that a domestic partner relationship exists.
Currently not in a marriage contract.
No marriage contract has ever been entered
**Description:**A proper value is applicable, but not known.

Usage Notes: This means the actual value is not known. If the only thing that is unknown is how to properly express the value in the necessary constraints (value set, datatype, etc.), then the OTH or UNC flavor should be used. No properties should be included for a datatype with this property unless:

ol.li: Those properties themselves directly translate to a semantic of "unknown". (E.g. a local code sent as a translation that conveys 'unknown')
Those properties further qualify the nature of what is unknown. (E.g. specifying a use code of "H" and a URL prefix of "tel:" to convey that it is the home phone number that is unknown.)

title.value: FR Core ValueSet Patient gender INS ValueSet

p.style: border: black 1px dotted; background-color: #EEEEEE; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px

tr.td: Hôpital militaire du Service de santé des armées

Etablissements scolaires, universitaires et de formation hors champ FINESS
Etablissements FINESS de formation aux professions sanitaires et sociales
Etablissement pour la protection de l'enfance
Laboratoire d'analyses et de biologie médicale
Répartition et Distribution de médicaments et dispositifs médicaux
Fabrication, Exploitation et Importation de médicaments et dispositifs médicaux
Secteur privé, praticien hospitalier temps plein
Autre établissement du domaine social ou médico-social
Fab, Exploit, Import, Répart, Distrib médicaments et dispo médicaux
Entreprise indus et tertiaire hors pharmaceutique
Permanence des soins ambulatoires hors cabinet
Structure de coop avec autorisation de soins
Maison de santé ou Pôle de santé
Siège administratif d'un établissement de santé
Centre de dépistage et de prévention
Structure de coop avec mission coordination soins
Labo de biologie médicale hors catégorie standard
Structure Dispensatrice à domicile d'Oxygène à usage médical

li.a: codesystem FR Core CodeSystem v2-0203 v2.0.0 (CodeSystem)

div.p: A unique number assigned to the document affirming that a person is a citizen of the country.
A number that is unique to a living subject within an Assigning Authority.
A number that is unique to a patient within an Assigning Authority.

tr.td: Associé dans une société d'exercice (SEL ou SCP)
Médecin chef d'un hôpital d'instruction des Armées
Directeur de région ou chef d'établissement du SSA
Adjoint au chef d'un hôpital ou d'un établissement
Permanence des soins ambulatoires hors cabinet
Participation libérale aux missions de service public d'un ES
Intervention libérale dans le cadre d'un GCS
Avocat participant aux processus de soins sans consentement (eSSS)
Mandataire judiciaire à la protection des majeurs (MJPM)
Autre acteur mettant en oeuvre la méthode MAIA
Technicien de l'intervention sociale et familiale
Conseiller en économie sociale et familiale
Biologiste médical ni médecin ni pharmacien
Autre salarié de la structure sociale

Parent biologique, au sens père ou mère
